---
title: "07 Multi Sample Summary"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("01_main_setup.R")
module <- "07_multi_sample_summary"
```

```{r}
idx <- read_optional_tsv(file.path(result_dir, "13_multi_sample_summary", "tables", "summary_index.tsv"))
if (nrow(idx) > 0) {
  write_review_table(idx, module, "summary_index_review.csv")
  p <- idx |>
    ggplot(aes(summary, rows, fill = summary)) +
    geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = rep(pandoraseq_palette, 20)) +
    theme_spatial() +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Rows")
  save_plot_versions(p, module, "summary_table_rows", width = 6, height = 4)
  p
}
```
